name: NewCastle Gold Ltd.
description: NewCastle Gold Ltd. was a Canadian-based gold exploration and development company primarily focused on the advancement of its Castle Mountain Gold Project located in San Bernardino County, California. The company was dedicated to optimizing and developing this permitted project to unlock its significant gold resource potential. In 2017, NewCastle Gold entered into a business combination with Trek Mining Inc. and Anfield Gold Corp. to form Equinox Gold Corp., a multi-asset, low-cost gold producer, effectively consolidating its operations into a larger mining entity.
